title: Standard Operating Procedure - Package Handling
content:
Step 1: Receive package at loading dock
Step 2: Scan barcode using handheld scanner
Step 3: Verify address against shipping label
Step 4: Sort package by destination zone
Step 5: Load onto designated delivery vehicle
Step 6: Update tracking status in system

Note: For fragile items, ensure proper cushioning and FRAGILE sticker placement.
summary: Complete SOP for handling incoming packages at DHL facilities, from receiving to loading for delivery.

versionHistory.content: Initial draft of package handling procedure

title: Customer Complaint Resolution Flowchart
content: Customer submits complaint → Log in CRM → Categorize issue type → Assign to department → Investigate → Propose resolution → Customer approval → Close ticket
summary: Step-by-step guide for resolving customer complaints efficiently.

title: Week 15 Operations Update - Customs Clearance Changes
content:
Starting May 1st, 2026, all international shipments to EU countries require additional customs documentation. The new ICS2 (Import Control System 2) requires:

1. Complete consignee information including EORI number
2. Detailed commodity description (no generic terms)
3. Country of origin for each item
4. Commercial invoice value in EUR

Failure to provide this information will result in customs holds and delivery delays.
summary: Important update about new EU customs requirements effective May 2026.

title: Week 16 Operations Update - Holiday Schedule
content:
Please be advised of the following holiday schedule for May 2026:

- May 1: Labour Day (No operations in Malaysia, Singapore, Indonesia)
- May 13: Vesak Day (Limited operations in Malaysia)
- May 20: Ascension Day (Reduced operations in Germany, France)

Plan shipments accordingly to avoid delays.
summary: Holiday schedule for May 2026 affecting regional operations.

title: RPA Import Test - Email from Customer
content:
Customer Inquiry: 'My package DHL123456789 was supposed to arrive yesterday but tracking shows it's still at the hub. Can you check what's happening?'

Resolution: Contacted local hub, package was mis-sorted to wrong delivery route. Expedited delivery arranged for today. Customer notified.
summary: Sample customer email processed by RPA automation
